response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years specifically in production-grade AI solutions, cloud-based GenAI system design, or RAG/vector database implementation — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Proven leadership in technical workshops, open-source projects, and cross-functional engineering teams
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization in work history
AI/ML experience appears incidental rather than core focus; insufficient evidence of 8+ years in production AI systems
Lacks documented experience leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders or building AI observability pipelines

key_factors.factor: Lack of proven GenAI/RAG production experience
